message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' version: 1.0.0
' skin: plain

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
    ArrowColor Black
}

entity Artist {
    * id : VARCHAR
    name : VARCHAR
    instagram : VARCHAR
    facebook : VARCHAR
    twitter : VARCHAR
    wikipedia : VARCHAR
    bio : TEXT
}

entity Album {
    * id : VARCHAR
    title : VARCHAR
    release : VARCHAR
    image : VARCHAR
}

entity Song {
    * id : VARCHAR
    album_id : VARCHAR
    title : VARCHAR
    duration : INT
}

entity PlaylistCategory {
    * id : VARCHAR
    name : VARCHAR
    image : VARCHAR
    icon : VARCHAR
}

entity Playlist {
    * id : VARCHAR
    * name : VARCHAR
    description : TEXT
    image : VARCHAR
    category_id : VARCHAR
    * user_id : VARCHAR
}

entity PodcastCategory {
    * id : VARCHAR
    name : VARCHAR
    image : VARCHAR
    icon : VARCHAR
}

entity Podcast {
    * id : VARCHAR
    --
    name : VARCHAR
    about : TEXT
    image : VARCHAR
    category_id : VARCHAR
    * user_id : VARCHAR
}

entity Episode {
    * id : VARCHAR
    podcast_id : VARCHAR
    title : VARCHAR
    description : TEXT
    published_at : DATE
    duration : INT
}

entity User
entity Concert

@enduml
```
